assessment.note: Says delayed feedback-seeking is due to insufficient trust with adjacent teams, which mildly signals a growth barrier; wellbeing is not engaged by the answer. [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'trust with adjacent teams' could be picked up next session, but drill cap requires advancing the arc.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Questioning pattern
new_queue.name: What keeps you from asking more questions earlier?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the barrier behind the low-question pattern without assuming the cause.

new_queue.label: Earlier signals
new_queue.name: What would help you spot expectation drift earlier next time?
new_queue.description: Moves toward a practical change in how he reads and surfaces alignment issues.
